title: Infosys awarded £1.2 billion 15-year NHSBSA workforce management contract
detailed_summary: Infosys announced on October 14, 2025 that it was awarded a £1.2 billion, 15-year contract by the NHS Business Services Authority to deliver the Future NHS Workforce Solution for the NHS in England and Wales. Infosys will develop a data-driven workforce management solution to replace the current Electronic Staff Record system and continue supporting payroll for 1.9 million NHS employees, covering over £55 billion in annual payroll. The solution is intended to support the NHS 10-year Health Plan and cover the employee lifecycle from recruitment and onboarding to payroll, career development, and retirement, with AI-driven tools and integration with other systems.
